ABB.name: ABB Migration
ABB.desc: ABB Freelance Migration Tool — converts ABB Freelance 2016 CSV exports into structured output folders.

DeltaV.name: LiveTools
DeltaV.desc: Desktop toolkit for DeltaV Live .ahc graphics files: tabular reports, an interactive editor with live rendering, bulk find/replace, thumbnail export, structural compare, project-wide library analysis, and localization.

DeltaV.name: DvHistExport
DeltaV.desc: Exports DeltaV Continuous Historian data — connects to a historian node, live tag search, reads raw samples over a time range, and exports to CSV. Pure-Python client over the DeltaV historian DLLs (32-bit).

DeltaV.name: SuperOPCWatchIt
DeltaV.desc: Advanced OPC-DA Tag Monitor for Emerson DeltaV. Live tag browsing, CSV import/export, write audit log.

DeltaV.name: DifFHX
DeltaV.desc: Compares two DeltaV FHX files and generates a diff report in Excel or PDF format.

DeltaV.name: FHXport
DeltaV.desc: Parses a DeltaV FHX file and generates 11 report types: Interlock, Alarm, IO, Module, EM, Reference, Historian, User Log, Phase, Named Set, PID Tuning.

DeltaV.name: FHXEdit
DeltaV.desc: Interactive tree editor for DeltaV FHX files with advanced find-and-replace, bulk delete, split, trim, and partial export.

DeltaV.name: WebFHX
DeltaV.desc: Converts a DeltaV FHX export into a portable standalone HTML viewer with hierarchy tree and optional FBD/SFC graphics.

DeltaV.name: EMTools
DeltaV.desc: Unified DeltaV Equipment Module toolkit — generate EMs from templates with a visual SFC logic editor, export/import class parameters as CSV, and auto-comment SFC steps, all over a shared document library.

DeltaV.name: FHXMerge
DeltaV.desc: Merges two DeltaV FHX files with element-level conflict resolution via a dual-pane diff interface.

DeltaV.name: ModExport
DeltaV.desc: Parses a DeltaV FHX file and exports module configuration data organised by class, generating CSV and FMT files per class.

DeltaV.name: FMTExport
DeltaV.desc: Filters and formats a DeltaV FHX export to match the columns defined in an existing FMT template file, producing aligned CSV output.

DeltaV.name: FMTMaker
DeltaV.desc: Creates DeltaV-compatible .fmt format specification files from Excel or CSV input files.

DeltaV.name: CEMatrix
DeltaV.desc: Analyses a DeltaV FHX export to generate an interactive HTML interlock matrix and network graph.

DeltaV.name: TuningAid
DeltaV.desc: OPC UA-connected PID tuning tool with step testing, process characterisation, and live trending for DeltaV loops.

DeltaV.name: DvTwin
DeltaV.desc: DeltaV control system digital twin with OPC UA connectivity, FHX simulation, automated test runner, bulk import/export, and historian.

DeltaV.name: FHXVerify
DeltaV.desc: Validates DeltaV FHX exports - reference, integrity, SFC, named-set, and DeltaV Module Analysis checks (MODE.ACTUAL, hardcoded confirms, name limits) with typo detection - and applies auto-fixes, with a browsable HTML report.

DeltaV.name: OPCBridge
DeltaV.desc: OPC DA to OPC UA bridge for DeltaV - native 32-bit COM interop to the DeltaV DA server, republished as an OPC UA server with live diagnostics.

DeltaV.name: Op2Live
DeltaV.desc: Converts DeltaV Operate graphics to DeltaV Live — a vendored Python port of Emerson's ConversionUtility wrapped in a guided 12-phase pipeline (parse, scan, dynamo/contextual study, draft mappings, XSLT build/apply, verify, Excel reports) with a visual mapping editor and GEM thumbnails.

DeltaV.name: OperateTools
DeltaV.desc: Native Rust toolkit for DeltaV Operate (iFix) .grf picture files — property/inventory/tag/animation/VBA reports (XLSX/CSV), iFix-style find & replace with automatic output validation, embedded-Python mass-edit scripting, PNG thumbnail rendering, and structural compare.

DeltaV.name: VIMTools
DeltaV.desc: Reads Emerson/Mynah VimNet .vio configuration files for DeltaV Virtual I/O Modules - browse the VIM / controller / data-set tree, view EtherNet/IP buffer-to-signal mappings, and run read-only VIM diagnostics.

Provox.name: PvxIO
Provox.desc: Bidirectional converter for PROVOX IO configuration — export FHX to Excel (Files, Cards, Channels) or import Excel back to FHX.

Provox.name: PvxPDX
Provox.desc: Processes Provox PDX files to extract tables, FSTs, operations, and queries into human-readable output files.

Provox.name: PDXDiff
Provox.desc: Compares two folders of Provox PDX export data, generating a PDF summary and Excel change log of all differences.

Provox.name: FSTDecompiler
Provox.desc: GUI tool — decompiles Provox FST bytecode into human-readable pseudocode with a stage-by-stage viewer and syntax highlighting.

Provox.name: ODFDiff
Provox.desc: Diffs two HMI configuration directories, generating SVG overlays, interactive HTML screen reports, and Excel change logs.

Provox.name: PVXMigration
Provox.desc: Generates DeltaV migration deliverables from ProVOX configuration data — appendix tables (CSV), Basebuild (XLSX) and a Functional Requirements doc (DOCX).

Virtualization.name: VMCreds
Virtualization.desc: 4-stage tool for auditing, discovering accounts, bulk-updating passwords, and remediating scheduled tasks across Hyper-V VMs via WinRM.

Virtualization.name: VMTools
Virtualization.desc: Unified VM administration — Hyper-V file/user/process/IP management over WinRM, ESXi datastore uploads (SFTP), and ESXi template rebuilds (vSphere API).

Allen Bradley.name: ABComms
Allen Bradley.desc: GUI tool for communicating with Rockwell Allen-Bradley PLCs — tag read/write, tag browser, controller admin, and EDS-based chassis catalog lookup.

Allen Bradley.name: EDSCatalog
Allen Bradley.desc: Browser for CIP/EtherNet-IP EDS device files — resolves device identities to catalog numbers and lists configurable device parameters.

Allen Bradley.name: Logix2dv
Allen Bradley.desc: Rockwell Logix to DeltaV migration assistant - parses Studio 5000 L5X (and .ACD) exports, maps dependencies, and generates proposed DeltaV modules as importable FHX.

Allen Bradley.name: ABCommission
Allen Bradley.desc: EtherNet/IP device commissioning — a friendlier replacement for Rockwell's BootP-DHCP and Address Commissioning tools: discover devices (ListIdentity), assign IPs to factory-default devices via a built-in BOOTP/DHCP server, set the CIP TCP/IP config static, and read/write drive/adapter parameters. Probes a device to describe itself (identity, object-model scan, live self-describing parameter list with scaling) so no EDS or manual is needed for most devices.

CodeSys.name: STReader
CodeSys.desc: Converts IEC 61131-3 Structured Text programs into Process Flow Diagram HTML and PDF exports.

Documentation.name: P&ID Reader
Documentation.desc: Extracts tags, device types, symbols and connectivity from P&ID PDFs (OCR + OpenCV) into structured tables, instrument loops, QA overlays and a connectivity graph.

Documentation.name: TableX
Documentation.desc: Extracts tables and text from any document — images, scanned/digital PDFs, Word, PowerPoint and HTML — into CSV/Excel. Fully offline OCR (RapidOCR), nothing uploaded.

Documentation.name: FnR
Documentation.desc: Multi-format find & replace across Word, Excel, PowerPoint, DeltaV FHX, XML and text files — case-insensitive, whole-word, and regex matching with backreferences and a dry-run preview.

AI.name: MP4Transcribe
AI.desc: Offline video/audio transcriber powered by OpenAI Whisper. Batch-transcribe files or whole folders to text or .srt/.vtt subtitles, with language selection, translate-to-English, and automatic GPU acceleration. FFMPEG bundled; nothing is uploaded.

AI.name: CornerCode
AI.desc: Fully offline AI coding assistant — a local Qwen2.5-Coder-7B model (bundled llama-server) drives a project-aware editing agent with local embedding retrieval, offline web research, and document import/export (PDF/Word/Excel/PowerPoint), plus a built-in DeltaV FHX converter and custom skills. Nothing is uploaded; the model, embeddings, and runtime all ship in the box.

Reverse Engineering.name: ByteWright
Reverse Engineering.desc: Binary file detective — auto-analyses unknown files (magic numbers, entropy, embedded data, PE/ELF/Mach-O/PDF/OLE/PCAP, YARA rules, disassembly) into a plain-language verdict. Fully offline.

Reverse Engineering.name: Patina
Reverse Engineering.desc: Native decompiler — lifts Windows PE and Linux ELF binaries to readable C using an x86 disassembler and a custom IR.

Remote.name: CornerRDP
Remote.desc: Deterministic RDP console + visual automation builder — reaches Windows/DeltaV/OT nodes that mstsc can but WinRM cannot (Standard RDP Security/RC4, TLS, NLA) via the vendored rdpilot engine. Manual cockpit: live desktop with click-to-click control and typing, session clipboard, file push/pull, run-as-SYSTEM commands, guest-agent deploy, reboot. Power-Automate-style Flow builder: sequence blocks (click, type, wait-for/assert element, run command, screenshot, if/repeat/for-each-target) with per-step retry, variables, and live point-and-click authoring — turn any repetitive RDP chore into a saved, multi-target automation. Saved connection profiles; passwords never persisted.
